mapper.select: select id, member_id, quality_filter_enabled, muted_non_following, muted_not_following_you, muted_new_account, muted_default_profile, muted_unverified_email, muted_unverified_phone, push_connect, push_expert, push_likes, push_posts, push_comments, push_chat_messages, push_quotes, push_system, push_mentions from tbl_notification_preference where member_id = #{memberId}
mapper.insert: insert into tbl_notification_preference ( member_id, quality_filter_enabled, muted_non_following, muted_not_following_you, muted_new_account, muted_default_profile, muted_unverified_email, muted_unverified_phone, push_connect, push_expert, push_likes, push_posts, push_comments, push_chat_messages, push_quotes, push_system, push_mentions ) values ( #{memberId}, #{qualityFilterEnabled}, #{mutedNonFollowing}, #{mutedNotFollowingYou}, #{mutedNewAccount}, #{mutedDefaultProfile}, #{mutedUnverifiedEmail}, #{mutedUnverifiedPhone}, #{pushConnect}, #{pushExpert}, #{pushLikes}, #{pushPosts}, #{pushComments}, #{pushChatMessages}, #{pushQuotes}, #{pushSystem}, #{pushMentions} )
mapper.update: update tbl_notification_preference set quality_filter_enabled = #{qualityFilterEnabled}, muted_non_following = #{mutedNonFollowing}, muted_not_following_you = #{mutedNotFollowingYou}, muted_new_account = #{mutedNewAccount}, muted_default_profile = #{mutedDefaultProfile}, muted_unverified_email = #{mutedUnverifiedEmail}, muted_unverified_phone = #{mutedUnverifiedPhone}, push_connect = #{pushConnect}, push_expert = #{pushExpert}, push_likes = #{pushLikes}, push_posts = #{pushPosts}, push_comments = #{pushComments}, push_chat_messages = #{pushChatMessages}, push_quotes = #{pushQuotes}, push_system = #{pushSystem}, push_mentions = #{pushMentions}, updated_datetime = now() where id = #{id}
